codeReview.summary: All 7 code quality items are correctly implemented. The diff touches 2 files (drawing/lib.rs, compositor/main.rs) with a net -25 line reduction. GlyphCache docstrings accurately reflect the ~1.3 MiB size (95 × 13824 = 1,313,280 bytes). All 4 stale status bar references removed (confirmed via grep). SVG parsing extracted into a clean rasterize_svg_icon() helper with proper OOM handling and early returns. Message ordering invariant is well-documented with a 15-line block comment listing all 5 messages in order. TrueTypeFont cached at startup via PROP_TTF static with justified lifetime transmute (font data is process-lifetime). Stem darkening doc correctly updated: strict boost range 1..=251, identity at 252..=254 (verified mathematically with boost=70). Ctrl+Tab logic deduplicated into process_key_event() with a KeyAction return struct; both input channel handlers now call it identically.

issues.description: KeyAction.consumed field is defined and set in process_key_event() but never read by any caller. The field is harmless (good documentation of what happened internally) but is technically dead code. Could be removed or marked with #[allow(dead_code)] if the compiler warns about it, though in this no_std bare-metal context the compiler may not warn on struct fields.

In rasterize_svg_icon(), the inner let binding `let ptr = alloc::alloc::alloc_zeroed(layout) as *mut drawing::SvgPath; ptr` has an unnecessary intermediate variable (just `alloc::alloc::alloc_zeroed(layout) as *mut drawing::SvgPath` would suffice). This is stylistic only — no functional impact.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker's skillFeedback suggests the os-worker skill's visual verification step should note that pure refactors (no display pipeline behavior change) don't require QEMU screenshot verification. This is a reasonable suggestion — the skill currently says 'MANDATORY for display pipeline changes' which could be interpreted as requiring screenshots even for comment-only or doc-only changes to display pipeline files.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges: 'The os-worker skill's visual verification step could note that pure refactors (no display pipeline behavior change) don't require QEMU screenshot verification, saving time.'

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md test baseline says '921 tests must pass at all times (900 system + 21 prototype)' but the worker's verification shows 900 tests passed. This is consistent since 21 are prototype tests run separately. However the AGENTS.md baseline number should be verified/updated if test counts have changed across missions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md says 921 total, worker ran system tests (900 passed) and did not run prototype tests separately. The handoff doesn't mention prototype tests.

summary: Clean pass. All 7 code quality items from the M2 scrutiny review are correctly implemented: docstrings updated, stale references removed, two duplicated code blocks extracted into shared functions (rasterize_svg_icon ~70 lines, process_key_event ~60 lines), TrueTypeFont cached at startup, and documentation corrected. Two non-blocking style observations noted (unused KeyAction.consumed field, redundant intermediate variable). No bugs, no regressions, net -25 lines.
